Items.Key: command injection via system() in admin console|command injection||critical|1|enhanced_calc.cpp|608|608|execute_admin_command|system(cmd.c_str());|arbitrary command execution by authenticated users, potentially leading to full system compromise.|user input passed directly to system() without sanitization or validation.|replace system() with a secure execution method, validate and sanitize all inputs, or use a sandboxed environment.
